description: For generating in-depth, authoritative white papers and research reports on industry topics, technology trends, or strategic recommendations.
toneDescription: Authoritative and research-backed. Build the argument from problem to evidence to solution to recommendation. Academic rigor without academic inaccessibility.

clarifyingQuestions.question: What is the core thesis or argument of this white paper?
Who is the target audience? (e.g. CTOs, CFOs, policy makers, practitioners)
Are there specific data points, statistics, or research findings to incorporate?

author: prodeck-builtin
